  {
    text: 'It was about:\n' +
      '• Reading old code\n' +
      '• Understanding past decisions\n' +
      '• Fixing things written by someone else\n' +
      '• Communicating clearly with teammates\n' +
      'Aarav noticed something:\n' +
      'The best developers didn’t write the most code.\n' +
      'They asked better questions.\n' +
      'Chapter 5: Learning the Hard Way\n' +
      'One day, Aarav spent 6 hours debugging an issue.\n' +
      'Later, his teammate fixed it in 10 minutes.\n' +

      '• He focused on understanding why something worked\n' +
      'He stopped chasing shortcuts.\n' +
      'Instead, he built context for himself.\n' +

      '• His debugging improved\n' +
      '• His confidence increased\n' +
